console.log("Hello World")

```mermaid
flowchart TD
    A([Start: Search for Mermaid City]) --> B{What's in the distance?}
    B -->|Singing| C[Investigate the Sirens]
    B -->|Glow in the water| D[Follow the Bioluminescence]
    
    C -->|It's a trap| E[Run away fast!]
    C -->|It's a secret path| F([Arrive at the Crystal Realm])
    
    D -->|Coral Reef| G[Meet the Sea King]
    D -->|Deep Trench| H([Discover the Sunken City])

    classDef danger fill:#f96,stroke:#333,stroke-width:2px;
    classDef safe fill:#9f6,stroke:#333,stroke-width:2px;
    classDef start fill:#bbf,stroke:#333,stroke-width:2px;
    
    class E danger;
    class F,H safe;
    class A start;
```
